subSteps.input:
{'draft_id': '56422ebe-3d54-4fac-8d20-0fff039dd4f8', 'planning_notes': '1) First, I need to read the CSV file containing the report data using datasource.read
2) Then I need to filter for the rows containing the years 2024 and 2001
3) Extract the identity theft report counts for both years
4) Use python.code to calculate the ratio of 2024 to 2001
5) Use llm.answer to provide the final answer', 'workflow': {'root': {'nodes': {'read_file': {'id': 'read_file', 'type': 'datasource.read', 'params': {'datasource_id': '0e853414-bc10-466a-b95c-7c5dd41cdbfa'}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 80, 'y': 120}}}, 'filter_2024': {'id': 'filter_2024', 'type': 'rows.filter', 'params': {'column': 'Number of Reports by Type', 'operator': 'eq', 'value': '2024'}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 320, 'y': 80}}}, 'filter_2001': {'id': 'filter_2001', 'type': 'rows.filter', 'params': {'column': 'Number of Reports by Type', 'operator': 'eq', 'value': '2001'}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 320, 'y': 160}}}, 'select_identity_theft_2024': {'id': 'select_identity_theft_2024', 'type': 'rows.select', 'params': {'columns': ['Identity Theft ']}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 560, 'y': 80}}}, 'select_identity_theft_2001': {'id': 'select_identity_theft_2001', 'type': 'rows.select', 'params': {'columns': ['Identity Theft ']}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 560, 'y': 160}}}, 'calculate_ratio': {'id': 'calculate_ratio', 'type': 'python.code', 'params': {'code': 'import sys, json

data = json.load(sys.stdin)

# Load both datasets
try:
    dataset_2024 = data['dataset_ref'][0]
    dataset_2001 = data['dataset_ref'][1]
except (IndexError, TypeError):
    # Fallback for single dataset
    dataset_2024 = data['dataset_ref']
    dataset_2001 = data['dataset_ref']

# Load the actual dataframes
if isinstance(dataset_2024, list):
    df_2024 = load_dataset_refs(data)[0]
    df_2001 = load_dataset_refs(data)[1]
else:
    df_2024 = load_dataset_ref(dataset_2024)
    df_2001 = load_dataset_ref(dataset_2001)

# Get the identity theft values
value_2024 = df_2024.iloc[0]['Identity Theft ']
value_2001 = df_2001.iloc[0]['Identity Theft ']

# Clean the values (remove commas and convert to int)
value_2024 = int(value_2024.replace(',', ''))
value_2001 = int(value_2001.replace(',', ''))

# Calculate ratio
ratio = value_2024 / value_2001

# Emit the result as a simple JSON object
emit_json({"ratio": ratio, "year_2024": value_2024, "year_2001": value_2001})'}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 800, 'y': 120}}}, 'answer': {'id': 'answer', 'type': 'llm.answer', 'params': {'question': 'Calculate the ratio of identity theft reports in 2024 vs 2001 from the provided dataset.'}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 1040, 'y': 120}}}}, 'edges': {'edge_file_to_2024_filter': {'id': 'edge_file_to_2024_filter', 'source': {'node_id': 'read_file', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'filter_2024', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}, 'edge_file_to_2001_filter': {'id': 'edge_file_to_2001_filter', 'source': {'node_id': 'read_file', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'filter_2001', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}, 'edge_2024_filter_to_select': {'id': 'edge_2024_filter_to_select', 'source': {'node_id': 'filter_2024', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'select_identity_theft_2024', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}, 'edge_2001_filter_to_select': {'id': 'edge_2001_filter_to_select', 'source': {'node_id': 'filter_2001', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'select_identity_theft_2001', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}, 'edge_2024_select_to_calculate': {'id': 'edge_2024_select_to_calculate', 'source': {'node_id': 'select_identity_theft_2024', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'calculate_ratio', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}, 'edge_2001_select_to_calculate': {'id': 'edge_2001_select_to_calculate', 'source': {'node_id': 'select_identity_theft_2001', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'calculate_ratio', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}, 'edge_calculate_to_answer': {'id': 'edge_calculate_to_answer', 'source': {'node_id': 'calculate_ratio', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'answer', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}}}}}
